integration_evidence.summary: Manifest marks the existing reserved-domain read package as the first low-risk sample read package and binds it to the redacted fixture.
Repo-local package index exposes the selected sample marker and fixture path without adding hosted registry or runtime behavior.
Lifecycle metadata treats sample package selection as an explicit promotion prerequisite and version-relevant binding.
